ordinanceLabel: Palo Alto Municipal Code · American Legal · Title 16 (Building) · Title 18 (Zoning) · Ord. 5627 (Energy, eff. Oct 4, 2024)
fireAgency: Palo Alto Fire Department (PAFD) — Fire Prevention Bureau · City fire department (NOT Santa Clara County Fire) · Apply via Accela ACA · firepermits@cityofpaloalto.org · (650) 329-2981 · Fire plan check: 8% of permit fee (SFR), 40% (MF/commercial) · Express fire check: $481
utility: City of Palo Alto Utilities (CPAU) — city-owned municipal utility, NOT PG&E · Engineering: (650) 566-4500 · 1007 Elwell Court, Palo Alto, CA 94303 · NEM 2 (not NEM 3.0 — exempt from CPUC) · CPAU pre-approval required BEFORE building permit for solar/ESS · Building Inspector grants PTO at final inspection
